category_sources: Official Spack documentation and GitHub repository describe Spack as a package manager supporting multiple versions, configurations, platforms, and compilers.
display_name_sources: Official documentation and source_facts.name identify the project as Spack.
docs_sources: Official Spack Read the Docs site is the dedicated documentation surface; spack.io is the official homepage from source_facts.homepage.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already populated; per instruction repo was not re-evaluated.
tags_sources: Official GitHub topics include package-manager, hpc, scientific-computing, and build-tools; source_facts.executables lists the spack CLI.
